lt comdr.t: abbr. Lieutenant Commander [亦作 Lt. Com.]

lt gov.t: abbr. Lieutenant Governor 政府副州长

lta.t: abbr. 线路终端适配器（Line Terminal Adapter）；草地网球协会（Lawn Tennis Association）

ltar.t: abbr. logical track address register 逻辑跟踪地址寄存器

ltb.t: abbr. 公司名（Listen to Believe）；论坛币

ltc.t: abbr. 长期护理（Long Term Care）；有线线路分配器（Londline Trunk Coutroller）

ltd..t: abbr. (=Limited)常用于股份有限公司的名称后

lte.t: abbr. 长期演进（Long Term Evolution）；局部热动平衡（Local Thermodynamic Equilibrium）

lter.t: abbr. longterm ecological research 长期生态研究

ltfv.t: abbr. less than fair value 小于正常值

ltg.t: abbr. 拉莫三嗪；线路中继组（Line Terminator Group）；地区战术方格

lti.t: [医][=low temperature isotropic]各向同性低温，低温各向同性的

ltl.t: abbr. 立陶宛立特（立陶宛的货币名称缩写）；零担（less than truckload）

ltm.t: abbr. longterm mortgage 长期抵押; low thermal mass 低热量物质

ltms.t: abbr. 低热质量（low thermal mass）；长期抵押（long - term mortgage）；长期存储器（long - term memory）
ltms.d: n. your general store of remembered information

lto.t: abbr. 线性磁带开放协议（Linear Tape-Open）；低温氧化物

ltp.t: abbr. 长时程增强（Long-term potentiation）；总压力损失；线性程序升温器；低温钝化

ltt.t: abbr. liquid toning transfer 液体调色转移; low temperature tempering 低温回火

ltte.t: 泰米尔伊拉姆猛虎解放组织（Liberation Tigers of Tamil Eelam）
ltte.d: n a terrorist organization in Sri Lanka that began in 1970 as a student protest over the limited university access for Tamil students; currently seeks to establish an independent Tamil state called Eelam; relies on guerilla strategy including terrorist tactics that target key government and military personnel

ltv.t: abbr. loan to value 借款估价

ltx.t: abbr. labile toxin 不稳定性毒素
